apktool

First-time setup: install the ppkg CLI once (ensure ~/.deno/bin is on your PATH; see catalog for more):

deno install -g -A -n ppkg jsr:@patdx/pkg@0.7.1

Then install this package:

ppkg add apktool

Remove:

ppkg remove apktool

Or without installing the CLI:

deno run -A --reload jsr:@patdx/pkg@0.7.1 add apktool
